title: A Cultural Stroll in Galata & Beyoğlu
description: Spend a themed day in Istanbul: Galata Tower, SALT Galata, Mephisto Bookstore & Café - Beyoğlu, charming Galata.
notes: Look out over the city's rooftops.
Spend some time browsing contemporary exhibitions.
Take a book break on Istiklal Street.
Enjoy a quiet coffee in a narrow street.
Free public restrooms on the upper floor.
